reviews.comment:
Hice el service del auto (previo turno). Comenzaron a tiempo y terminaron en el horario acordado. El empleado muy cordial.
En el tiempo de espera trabaje en la cafeteria; el wifi funciono perfecto y no habia mucha gente. Recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
I had my car serviced (by appointment). They started on time and finished as scheduled. The employee was very friendly.
While waiting, I worked in the cafeteria; the Wi-Fi worked perfectly and it wasn't crowded. Highly recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLblp2YlFBEAE
